title: delphinium hesperium subsp. pallescens
intro: Delphinium hesperium subsp. pallescens is a plant species, specifically a subspecies of the Bear's Claw Larkspur (Delphinium hesperium), a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, antitussive, and expectorant properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Delphinium hesperium subsp. pallescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as a natural expectorant. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, have been historically used to treat various health conditions, although modern uses and dosages should be carefully researched and consulted with a medical professional.
